summary: Batch 4 Punch List - All 3 fixes verified. Fix 1: Profile dropdown cleaned (Settings removed, only My Profile/Support/Log Out). Fix 2: Support modal functional (POST /api/support, tickets saved with status:'open'). Fix 3: Custom top-up working (toggle Packages/Custom, quantity input, RM 15/credit rate, POST /api/wallet/topup/custom). All backend tests pass (13/13). All frontend UI tests pass.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Batch 4 Punch List complete. (1) Profile dropdown now has exactly 3 items: My Profile, Support, Log Out - NO Settings. (2) Support modal opens from dropdown, has Subject dropdown (Technical/Billing/General) and Message textarea, POST /api/support saves to support_tickets collection with status:'open'. (3) Wallet top-up modal has Packages/Custom Amount toggle, custom mode has quantity input (1-100) at RM15/credit rate, auto-calculated total, POST /api/wallet/topup/custom endpoint creates transaction record. Admin support tickets endpoint requires admin role (403 for students). Stripe payments remain MOCKED.

fix_1_profile_dropdown_cleanup.details: Dropdown shows exactly 3 items: My Profile, Support, Log Out. Settings option removed.

fix_2_support_modal.details: Modal opens from Support dropdown item. Subject select (Technical Issue/Billing & Payments/General Inquiry). Message textarea. Submit creates ticket with status:'open'. Success toast shown. Modal closes on success.

fix_2_support_backend.details: POST /api/support accepts subject + message, validates empty/invalid, creates ticket in support_tickets collection. GET /api/admin/support-tickets requires admin role (403 for students).

fix_3_custom_topup_ui.details: Top Up modal has Packages/Custom Amount toggle. Custom mode shows quantity input, 'Rate: RM 15 / credit', auto-calculated total. Success toast 'Added N credits!' shown.

fix_3_custom_topup_backend.details: POST /api/wallet/topup/custom accepts credits (1-100), validates range, returns success with credits_added/amount_myr/new_balance. Creates topup_paid transaction record.

mocked_apis.stripe_payments: Stripe payment processing remains MOCKED - custom top-up uses mocked payment gateway
mocked_apis.note: Payment processing is currently in demo mode message shown in modal
